tactic: Mechanism reveal -> ownership reframe -> recursion punch
primary_text:
324 Australian companies have raised on Birchal. Most Australians have never invested in one.

Until 2018, owning a piece of a private Australian company meant being a venture capitalist or knowing the founder. Then Crowd-Sourced Funding came in, and Birchal built the rails. 324 raises. Over $234M raised. 137,000 individual investments from everyday Australians backing brands they wanted to own a piece of.

Birchal is now opening its own raise on the platform it built.

Save your spot. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live, with time to read it before you decide.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: How Australian startups actually get funded
description: Save your spot to hear when Birchal's CSF offer opens.
_drc_playbook: 03 Aspirational Identity Sell (B2C considered, solution-aware, sophistication 3 mechanism)
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, currently using ETFs / Sharesies / Pearler.
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: uses 'save your spot', 'read', 'tell you the moment'. No 'invest now', 'buy now', 'subscribe'.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES: zero matches against blocklist regex.

VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: phrases 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live' (informing about launch is permitted) and 'time to read it before you decide'. No 'we will send you the offer document'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: short-form risk warning pasted byte-exact at end of primary_text.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: zero references to Zero Co or Old Young's.
Ownership framing present in para 2 ('own a piece of') -- FMTH PR #125 H2 confirmed.
_drc_assumptions_flagged: Audience awareness level: solution-aware -- assumes reader has heard of Birchal and broadly understands ETFs / retail investing but has not invested in CSF.
Sophistication stage: 3 (mechanism reveal) -- assumes a reveal of how CSF moves money is novel to the reader.
Pre-2018 framing ('VC or knowing the founder') is colloquial paraphrase of the pre-CSF retail-exclusion regime, not a sourced legal claim. Acceptable as plain-language opinion.
